methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Climate & Energy (found 2 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Climate & Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

private.name: QuantumScape
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Public), post-money $5B+

private.name: LanzaTech
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Public), post-money $800M+

data.narrative:
T1 Energy operates in the Climate & Energy sector as a public company, having raised over $1B across its funding history. The comparable universe for this stage and subsector is constrained: while 19 public and private peers exist broadly in Climate & Energy, the narrowly-filtered peer set yields only 2 same-stage comparables, 0 adjacent-stage peers, and 0 similar-tier valuations—insufficient for reliable median-based triangulation. The broader comp set includes 1 public peer (LanzaTech, ticker LNZA) and 8 private peers including QuantumScape, TAE Technologies, Redwood Materials, and Helion.

Given the sparse narrow peer set, the Peer-Median method is not applicable. The absence of ≥3 datapoints in the same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier buckets makes sector-wide median benchmarking methodologically unreliable and potentially misleading. Any valuation analysis would require alternative approaches—such as discounted cash flow, revenue multiples against the single public comparable (LNZA), or staged venture return expectations against late-stage private peers.

The core uncertainty is the thinness of comparable trading or exit data at T1 Energy's intersection of maturity, capital intensity, and specialized subsector. Analysts would need to either accept wider valuation bands reflecting this uncertainty, supplement with bottom-up unit economics, or await fuller disclosure of forward guidance post-publicization.
